name: Greek Salad Recipes

ingredients.item: Two teaspoons of freshly ground black pepper
A quarter cup of red wine vinegar
One cup of red-orange bell pepper

method: Add the olive oil and minced garlic into it.
Mix it well and spread it on the bread slices.
Add the parmesan cheese on top of the slices.
Bake the slices for ten minutes.
Dish out the bread slices when they are done.
Add the English cucumber, Kalamata olives, red-orange bell pepper,
cherry tomatoes, and feta cheese into the bowl.
Mix everything well and set it aside.
Add the olive oil, red wine vinegar, kosher salt, minced garlic,
freshly crushed black pepper, fresh oregano, and dried oregano.
Pour this dressing on the prepared salad.
Mix everything well and add the toasted bread slices to the side.
Your dish is ready to be served.
